title.zh: 发出「波波波」笑声的两米四高女人
title.en: The eight-foot woman who laughs 'po po po'

summary.zh: 身高八尺、头戴宽檐帽的女人，发出「波波波」的怪声，被她看上的年轻人会在几天内被带走。2008年8月2ch「洒落怖」系列帖发帖流传。
summary.en: A woman some eight shaku tall, often in a wide-brimmed hat, voicing an odd 'po po po'; young people she takes a liking to are carried off within days. Posted to 2channel's Sharekowa thread series in August 2008.

description.zh:
八尺样是身高约八尺（近两米四）的女性怪异，装束随目击而变——有时是白色连衣裙，有时像丧服，唯一不变的是那顶宽檐帽和口中「波、波、波」的低沉怪声。她只在特定村落一带活动，被村外四座地藏封住去路；一旦「看上」某个年轻人，那人会在几天到几十天内被带走。

原帖2008年8月26日出现在2ch「死ぬほど洒落にならない怖い話を集めてみない？」（洒落怖）系列帖：叙事者高中时暑假回乡下祖父母家，在院子里听见帽檐下传来「波波波」声，看见篱笆外一个高得反常的女人。祖父脸色骤变，连夜请来邻村老妪，把他关进贴满符纸的二楼房间，盐堆四角，木盒里供着佛像。深夜有人用他父亲的声音在门外喊，窗外反复传来敲击玻璃与「波波波」声。天亮后全村亲戚开来九辆车，把他藏在正中一辆的后座，一路念佛冲出村界——途中他从指缝里瞥见田埂上那个女人。祖父叮嘱他此生不得再回村。帖子结尾说，十几年后祖父病危想见他最后一面，家人来电反复叮嘱：绝对不要回来。

这篇结构完整的「洒落怖」名作是2ch时代创作型怪谈的巅峰之一，此后被大量转载、朗读、漫画化，英语圈以「Hachishakusama」之名进入creepypasta体系，衍生角色遍及游戏与同人创作。原帖从未指明村庄所在，这个空白正是它可以落在任何人故乡的原因。
description.en:
Hasshaku-sama is a female apparition roughly eight shaku, nearly two and a half meters, tall. Her clothes change from sighting to sighting, a white dress in one account, mourning black in another, but the wide-brimmed hat and the low, popping 'po po po' from beneath it are constant. She haunts a single rural district, penned in by four Jizo statues at its boundaries, and when she takes a liking to a young person, that person is carried off within days.

The original story was posted on 26 August 2008 to 2channel's Sharekowa thread series ('scary stories that are no laughing matter'). The narrator, a high schooler summering at his grandparents' village, hears the popping sound in the garden and sees an impossibly tall woman over the hedge. His grandfather goes pale, summons an old woman from a neighboring hamlet, and shuts the boy in an upstairs room sealed with paper charms, salt heaped in the corners, a small Buddha image in a wooden box. In the night something calls through the door in his father's voice; knuckles rap the window glass between bursts of 'po po po.' At dawn the extended family arrives in nine cars, hides him in the back seat of the middle one, and runs the convoy out of the village while chanting, and through his fingers he glimpses the woman standing on a paddy ridge. He is told never to return. Years later, the story ends, his dying grandfather asks to see him, and the family phones only to insist: do not come.

The tale is one of the summits of 2channel-era composed horror, endlessly reposted, read aloud, and drawn, entering English creepypasta as Hachishakusama. The post never names the village, which is precisely why it can sit just outside anyone's hometown.

value.zh: 八尺身高、宽檐帽、「波波波」声
value.en: Eight shaku tall, wide-brimmed hat, 'po po po'
Four Jizo statues at the village bounds

sources.zh: 2ch「死ぬほど洒落にならない怖い話」系列帖（2008年8月26日）
朝里树《日本现代怪异事典》（2018年）
sources.en: Asazato Itsuki, Nihon Gendai Kaii Jiten (2018)

image.sourceTitle: Aomori countryside (rural setting context; not a sighting photograph)
